programmes.show_description: Martial arts action with Josh Hartnett and Woody Harrelson. A mysterious drifter, a bartender and a young samurai join up against a ruthless leader and deadly assassins (2010).

Hollister investigates when $30,000 in payroll money is stolen from the Army officer.
Hired killers have the run of the town after the end of a bloody range war, but one rancher whose son was killed wants revenge.
Hollister tracks a man who murdered an old miner and stole the man's gold.

Investigating the disappearance of a client and friend, Mannering uncovers a bizarre sect intent on defrauding its hapless followers and he is top of their hit list for assassination.

John Cannon's family arrives at a ranch near Tucson, Ariz. His wife names it High Chaparral. Early on they learn they have two enemies, who steal their cattle.
The Ministry suspect that Steed has become a double agent when he starts to behave suspiciously. But can he keep his secret safe and save Purdey ?
The Avengers find themselves investigating the death of a man who is found with £50,000 of stolen diamonds in his stomach. Will a number of dog hairs enable Peel and Steed to solve the case?
Mannering is at the centre of an elaborate deception around the sale of the Seven Eyes of Night, a necklace once owned by the Empress Joséphine and now in the hands of a dangerous gang.
